title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 226.501 - Tenth amendment to United States Constitution quoted
text:
226.501.  Tenth amendment to United States Constitution quoted. — Be it remembered that the tenth amendment to the United States Constitution reads as follows:  "The powers not delegated to the United States by the Constitution, nor prohibited by it to the states, are reserved to the states respectively, or to the people".
(L. 1972 S.B. 382 § B) 
Effective 3-30-72
